name: claude-code-watchdog
description: Watchdog — a self-referential Claude Code loop that re-feeds the same prompt until files actually stop changing. Apache 2.0, derived from ralph-loop.

plugins.name: watchdog
plugins.description: Self-referential loop for Claude Code that re-feeds the user's prompt until the task truly stops producing file edits. Uses a headless Haiku classifier to judge convergence, requires the agent to actually call tools before exit (no pure-text 'done' claims), and is hidden from the agent so it cannot cheat. Apache 2.0, derived from ralph-loop.
